query:
WITH
            filtered_ids AS (
                SELECT refs.id
                FROM refs
                WHERE
                    -- filter by minimum permission level (read)
                    get_max_permission($1, refs.id) >= 'read'::permission_level
                    -- exclude public-only documents (user must have explicit permission)
                    AND EXISTS (
                        SELECT 1
                        FROM permissions p_searcher
                        WHERE
                            p_searcher.object = refs.id
                            AND p_searcher.subject = $1
                    )
            )
        SELECT
            refs.id AS "ref_id!",
            snapshots.content->>'name' AS name,
            snapshots.content->>'type' AS type_name,
            snapshots.content->>'theory' AS theory,
            refs.created AS "created_at!",
            refs.deleted_at,
            snapshots.content AS "content!",
            refs.current_snapshot AS "current_snapshot!",
            COALESCE(
                (SELECT json_agg(json_build_object(
                    'user', p.subject,
                    'level', INITCAP(p.level::text)
                ) ORDER BY p.level DESC)
                FROM permissions p
                WHERE p.object = refs.id
                ), '[]'::json
            ) AS "permissions!: sqlx::types::Json<Vec<PermissionInfo>>",
            COALESCE(
                (SELECT json_object_agg(
                    s.id::text,
                    json_build_object(
                        'parent', s.parent,
                        'createdAt', s.created_at,
                        'heads', (SELECT array_agg(encode(h, 'hex')) FROM unnest(s.heads) AS h)
                    )
                )
                FROM snapshots s
                WHERE s.for_ref = refs.id
                ), '{}'::json
            ) AS "snapshots!: sqlx::types::Json<HashMap<String, SnapshotInfo>>"
        FROM filtered_ids
        JOIN refs ON refs.id = filtered_ids.id
        JOIN snapshots ON snapshots.id = refs.current_snapshot
        ORDER BY refs.created DESC;
